name: Frontend Craft
description: Frontend team skills, OpenClaw workspace templates, optional init tool, exec safety hooks, and design MCP reference.

notifyOnAgentEnd.description: Desktop notification when an agent run completes successfully

runValidationOnGatewayStop.description: Run lint/typecheck/test/build from package.json when the gateway stops (uses cwd at stop time)

formatAfterWrite.description: Run Prettier on files touched by write/edit tools (after_tool_call)
